note: Screened against legal-freelance-scrape-2026-05-06.json, 2026-05-07.json, and 2026-05-08.json. 23 prior companies excluded: aVenture, Ropes & Gray (Funds Attorney program), Arootah, Constitution Capital Partners, Lawtrades, EBTH, Cooley LLP (Fund Formation NY), Norm Law LLP, Major Lindsey & Africa (Interim Legal Talent), AngelList Venture, VC Lab, Reed Smith LLP, Scale LLP, AMBART LAW, Outside GC (OGC), Legalpeople, Paragon Legal, Axiom Advice & Counsel (Axiom Law Fractional GC for PE/VC), Sleep Doctor, DLA Piper (Investment Funds Group), Direct Counsel, Foley Hoag LLP, Latitude Legal (Fractional GC / Funds & Wealth talent pool — specific live role postings included this scrape as distinct leads). Search window: 7 days. No A-grade (80+) leads this week — pipeline is shifting from marketplace/talent-pool inventory toward direct in-house contract postings, which is a higher-quality signal. Latitude Legal appears with two specific live job postings distinct from prior talent-pool entry.

leads.name: Robert Half — Senior Counsel: Investment & Fund Structuring (NYC)
leads.fundingStage: n/a (staffing firm on behalf of NYC investment firm)

fitDetails.practice_area: fund formation + investment structuring + tax-advantaged vehicles

intentDetails.apply_path: easy apply via Robert Half site

leads.compensationText: Long-term contract — rate not published; Robert Half NY senior counsel band typically $125–$200/hr
signals: Reports directly to Founder and leadership team
Fund formation + investment structuring scope explicit in posting
Tax-advantaged investment vehicles mentioned (signal of HNW/QSBS/OZ work)
15+ years required — targets Katie's seniority band exactly
leads.notes: Highest-substance lead this week. On-site NYC is the only constraint — confirm hybrid eligibility with recruiter before declining.

Private Funds + Real Estate practice area
VP-level seniority
Remote eligible (GA listed)
Resume signaling value beyond the role itself
